title: taraxacum cornutum
intro: Taraxacum cornutum, also known as the horned dandelion, is a rare species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is believed to possess medicinal properties due to its roots and leaves, which contain bitter compounds and sesquiterpenes. The plant has been traditionally used to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and improve liver function, making it a potential remedy for various ailments. Taraxacum cornutum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine.
